title: Potato Paintings RESOURCE PACK
description: The resources pack needed for the Potato Painting Datapack to work from the potato update (April fools 2024)
body:
This resource pack adds the paintings from the paintings from the potato update that came out for the April Fools of 2024
**Warning** you will need the [datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/potato-paintings) to have the painting work ingame
Here's the list of all the new paintings
- Tasty Shapes
> 2x2
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- Self-portrait
> 2x3
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- Potato
> 4x2
> In-game description: Cris B
- In The Spotlight
> 3x3
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- Hot Potato
> 4x4
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- This is not a potato
> 8x4
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- The Treachery of Potatoes
> 8x8
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
